       2e056:	2e00      	cmp	r6, #0

       2e058:	d0b7      	beq.n	2dfca <print_integer+0x286>

       2e05a:	e75d      	b.n	2df18 <print_integer+0x1d4>

    
out_wrapped_function (12)
